name: sync registries: /compliance-add with jurisdiction:EU routes into european-union/ folder
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://eu.gov/x --id eu-new --jurisdiction "EU" --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f "tree/european-union/eu-new.yaml" ] && echo ok 1>&2
